This is one of the latest Razer headsets that hit the scene toward the end of last year with a $180 price tag. Today’s deal delivers a 25% markdown to shave $45 of its usual going rate. We’ve seen the Mercury White and Quartz Pink variants of this headset go for less, but this is the lowest price we have seen the black model fetch to date. They’re all down to the $135 mark today, though, so you can pick the one you like after getting more details below.
